original_image_tags: scan of a mostly blank, aged, off-white paper document with two hole-punch marks at the top. The bottom of the page has blue stamped text, partially obscured by two pieces of aged adhesive tape. The stamps are inverted (upside-down relative to the page orientation). The paper shows slight creasing and wear along the edges.

elements.description: Blue stamps and markings at the bottom of the page, including 'RECEIVED', 'Aug 4 10 13 AM '46', 'U.S. DEPT. OF JUSTICE', 'RECD ESPIONAGE', 'Aug 4 4 18 PM '46', 'INTERNAL SECURITY', 'FBI', and 'DEPT OF JUSTICE'.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree the page is mostly blank with blue stamp text at the bottom; Description B provides the specific text of those stamps, which does not contradict Description A's general description.
